REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (90 Aquavista Way)
Off Calendar Nov-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $856,250.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 10/21/16. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt/review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
